station_address: Plot No CTS 1208, New Link Rd, near IP Colony, I C Colony, Eksar, Borivali West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400103
text:
A spacious BPCL petrol pump on link road in Mandpeshwar/IC colony area.

Free Air filling facility available along with Nitrogen air filling on payment.
Petrol & disel distribution done ✔️ as per official rate

High density petrol ⛽️ available too
Staff is courteous and professional.

station_address: Plot No CTS 1208, New Link Rd, near IP Colony, I C Colony, Eksar, Borivali West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400103
text: For years,  till a month ago, I used to always fill petrol at this petrol pump.  However, lately, a stocky, dark complexioned employee, not seen earlier, has been found reluctant to fill petrol and directing me always to another heavily occupied petrol station within the same compound.  I have discontinued patronizing this petrol pump, as I do not have the luxury of time.  I see no point patronizing a business that does not want my business.

station_address: Plot No CTS 1208, New Link Rd, near IP Colony, I C Colony, Eksar, Borivali West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400103
text:
Not the right place to fill air .All nearby tyre Specially the air filling it's a scam. They will show you some problem in the tyre and purposely damage it and then repair it. Few times I filled air and they damaged the opening valve. Due to which I had a puncture later while I was traveling. Unnecessary damage.
Pathetic management. Unprofessional workers' and very bad customer service.
If you have no choice then go for it or avoid going here. THEY CONSISTENTLY CHEAT.
